title: buildah bud vendor new test failing
body:
In my latest vendor PR https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26884 `bud with no instructions but with CLI flags that require a new image be written` is failing.

```
not ok 10 bud with no instructions but with CLI flags that require a new image be written
         # (from function `assert' in file tests/[helpers.bash, line 670](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/9a53b84821869cd3a247272210999586b72155fd/test/system/helpers.bash#L670),
         #  in test file tests/[bud.bats, line 290](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/9a53b84821869cd3a247272210999586b72155fd/test/system/bud.bats#L290))
         #   `assert ${iid} != ${baseiid}' failed
         # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.41.1-0.20250820185643-08775076a26c/tests /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.41.1-0.20250820185643-08775076a26c
         # # [checking for: docker.io/library/busybox]
         # # [copy docker://docker.io/library/busybox dir:/var/tmp/bats-run-X673yy/suite/buildah-image-cache/docker.io-library-busybox-]
         # Getting image source signatures
         # Copying blob sha256:9758c28807f21c13d05c704821fdd56c0b9574912f9b916c65e1df3e6b8bc572
         # Copying config sha256:f0b02e9d092d905d0d87a8455a1ae3e9bb47b4aa3dc125125ca5cd10d6441c9f
         # Writing manifest to image destination
         # # [copy dir:/var/tmp/bats-run-X673yy/suite/buildah-image-cache/docker.io-library-busybox- containers-storage:docker.io/library/busybox]
         # Getting image source signatures
         # Copying blob sha256:9758c28807f21c13d05c704821fdd56c0b9574912f9b916c65e1df3e6b8bc572
         # Copying config sha256:f0b02e9d092d905d0d87a8455a1ae3e9bb47b4aa3dc125125ca5cd10d6441c9f
         # Writing manifest to image destination
         # # podman build --force-rm=false --layers --annotation annotation1=annotationvalue1 --iidfile /var/tmp/buildah_tests.fbgn2i/baseiid.txt /var/tmp/buildah_tests.fbgn2i/context
         # STEP 1/3: FROM busybox
         # STEP 2/3: RUN pwd > /pwd.txt
         # --> 293eb9b18d27
         # STEP 3/3: LABEL baseimage=true
         # COMMIT
         # --> 80fc58a3444a
         # 80fc58a3444ad129281d80e69d1436409d9823fb3cdc1910d2756e902fbdadc4
         # # podman build --force-rm=false --iidfile /var/tmp/buildah_tests.fbgn2i/iid.txt --squash /var/tmp/buildah_tests.fbgn2i/context
         # STEP 1/1: FROM 80fc58a3444ad129281d80e69d1436409d9823fb3cdc1910d2756e902fbdadc4
         # COMMIT
         # --> 80fc58a3444a
         # 80fc58a3444ad129281d80e69d1436409d9823fb3cdc1910d2756e902fbdadc4
         # #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
         # #|     FAIL: podman build --force-rm=false --iidfile /var/tmp/buildah_tests.fbgn2i/iid.txt --squash /var/tmp/buildah_tests.fbgn2i/context
         # #| expected: != '80fc58a3444ad129281d80e69d1436409d9823fb3cdc1910d2756e902fbdadc4'
         # #|   actual:    '80fc58a3444ad129281d80e69d1436409d9823fb3cdc1910d2756e902fbdadc4'
         # #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
         # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.41.1-0.20250820185643-08775076a26c
```

https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5228255227150336/html/bud-podman-fedora-42-root-host-sqlite.log.html

I am going to skip the test for now to complete the vendor and unblock the monorepo vendor that follows shortly.

cc @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat

comments.body: This fails because `--squash` means different things for `buildah build` and `podman build`.  The podman version of the wrapper function can either replace all calls with `--squash` with `--squash-all`, or this one test can.
